name: documentation-consistency
description: Verify every versioned claim in the documentation matches the repository state, and correct the stale ones with cited sources.

objective.outcomeTemplate: Every versioned claim in ${repositoryId} documentation matches the code, with each correction citing the source line that proves it.
acceptanceCriteria: No stale version statements remain anywhere in the repository's documentation
Every corrected claim cites the file and line that makes it true
